title: SkyBlock Dark mode
description: Hypixel SkyBlock without hurting your eyes.
body:
# What's Skyblock Dark Mode
A **Hypixel Skyblock texture pack for 1.21.10-26.1.x** that implements a dark mode across various Skyblock zones.

The intention is to reduce eye strain during long gaming sessions, or simply because you like the aesthetic. 👍

___
This texture pack supports both:
- v2.0**f** - [Firmament](https://modrinth.com/mod/firmament) with additional zones using [Respackopts](https://modrinth.com/mod/respackopts).
- v2.0**c** - Full zones with [Catharsis Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/catharsis).

Respackopts is used with Firmament in order to make the pack configurable.
All zones and textures can be toggled through it.
___

## Zones
<details>
<summary>Base zones</summary>

- The Mist (Ghost Zone in Dwarven)
- The End
- Glacite Tunnels & Mineshafts
- Rift
  - Mirrorverse
  - Living Cave
  - Mountaintop

</details>

<details>
<summary>Extra zones/textures with Respackopts or Catharsis</summary>

- Crimson Isle
- Dungeons & Kuudra
- Jerry Island
- Fire colors (some variants)
- Lava colors (some variants, texture-only)
- Additional settings
  - Entity fire removal (from mobs or entities; note that you won't see Fire Aspect if this is enabled)

</details>


## Future content & Feedback
**Please feel free to share any ideas, suggestions, or issues you encounter on our Github issues.**
- The current state of Dungeons is still under development.

### Ideas
- We're working on a possible changes to the Mushroom Desert.
